introSection: Mini Mine Train is a steel hybrid kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA. The ride was built in 1969, three years after the original Runaway Mine Train. The Mini Mine Train was modified in 1997 to make way for Mr. Freeze.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Deep reddish orange track with unpainted supports.

fullText:
Mini Mine Train is a steel hybrid kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA. The ride was built in 1969, three years after the original Runaway Mine Train. The Mini Mine Train was modified in 1997 to make way for Mr. Freeze.



Deep reddish orange track with unpainted supports.
